textEn: May the hands of Abu Lahab perish, and may he perish!
textTranslit: Tab bat yadaa abee Lahabinw-wa tabb

textAr: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
textEn: Neither his wealth nor his worldly gains will avail him.
textTranslit: Maa aghna 'anhu maaluhu wa ma kasab

textEn: He will burn in a Flaming Fire,
textTranslit: Sa yas laa naran zaata lahab

textEn: and so will his wife, the carrier of firewood,
around her neck will be a rope of palm fiber.
